name: hireflow-ai
description: HireFlow AI — Full-Stack AI Hiring Copilot (React + Express BFF + Python CrewAI)

scripts.install: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:express
scripts.dev: concurrently -n express,web,ai -c teal,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:express" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:express && npm run build:ai
scripts.prod:deploy: docker build -t hireflow-ai . && (docker rm -f hireflow-ai || true) && docker run -d --name hireflow-ai -p 80:80 -p 4000:4000 -p 8001:8001 --restart unless-stopped hireflow-ai
scripts.update: git pull origin main && npm run deploy
